heading: Atlas Embedding and Reranking API
body:
The Embedding and Reranking API provides endpoints for accessing Voyage AI's
state-of-the-art embedding and reranking models. Use the REST API
and available client SDKs to power search and retrieval in your AI applications.

<Card cta="Learn about the Embedding and Reranking API" url="https://www.mongodb.com/docs/voyageai/api-reference/overview/" />
